title: Amazon News: Breaking news about Amazon and latest company updates
text: Amazon News: Breaking news about Amazon and latest company updates Amazon is investing billions in infrastructure and education to build stronger communities How Amazon prepares for its biggest shopping events of the year 8 free skills training programs that help Amazon employees land higher-paying roles CEO Andy Jassy explains 8 things you may not know about the company’s Leadership Principles Thousands of Amazon employees are landing higher-paying jobs through Career Choice LinkedIn names Amazon a top U.S. company where people want to work Amazon delivers another strong year of safety progress, making our workplaces even safer Amazon adds $1.4B to Housing Equity Fund to create an additional 14,000 affordable homes Amazon meets 100% renewable energy goal 7 years early Amazon named among the world’s most admired companies by ‘Fortune’ magazine 1 / 10 What you need to know about Amazon today Amazon introduces new 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options Amazon collaborates with NVIDIA on advanced AI assistants for cars AWS and Cerebras collaboration aims to set a new standard for AI inference speed Amazon delivers another strong year of safety progress Amazon expands free returns to over 10,000 U.S. locations Four out of five Amazon customers in the U.S. have access to return drop-off locations within five miles, now including FedEx Office locations.
